context.author: kraju
context.orig: unturned drop skinów masz 1/2 na tydzień
context.en: unturned drop skins you have 1/2 per week
context.pt: skins não reviradas você tem 1/2 por semana
context.label: clean

context.author: kraju
context.orig: a tu przed blokada steam ja dostawałem po 60/80 skrzynek na luzie
context.en: and here before the steam block I was getting 60/80 cases on a relaxed basis
context.pt: e aqui, antes do bloco a vapor, eu estava recebendo caixas 60/80 de maneira relaxada
context.label: clean

context.author: kraju
context.orig: a każda skrzynka która dropi w grze przechodzi przez steam , dlatego tez była te rng blokady na itemy
context.en: and every box that drops in the game goes through Steam, which is why there were also item locks
context.pt: e cada caixa que cai no jogo passa pelo Steam, por isso também houve bloqueios de itens
context.label: clean

context.author: kraju
context.orig: bo steam próbował ograniczyć masowe wystawianie itów przez boty ale nie udało się , wiec znerfił drop
context.en: because Steam tried to limit the mass posting of items by bots, but it failed, so it nerfed the drop
context.pt: porque o Steam tentou limitar a postagem em massa de itens por bots, mas falhou, então nerfou o drop
context.label: clean

context.author: entotus
context.orig: nie bedzie problemu ze ludzie beda cheatowac i dodawac sobie te szare niebieskie i zielone itemy ?
context.en: there won't be a problem with people cheating and adding these gray blue and green items?
context.pt: não haverá problema com pessoas trapaceando e adicionando esses itens cinza, azul e verde?
